result.summary: Found 4 visual issues on the BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, ranging from truncated navigation text to partially cut-off game cards and a misaligned bottom navigation item.

issues.description: Multiple game cards in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are cut off on the right edge of the screen with no visible scroll indicator, carousel dots, or affordance cues to inform users they can scroll horizontally.
issues.suggestion: Add visible scroll indicators such as pagination dots, a partial peek with shadow/gradient overlay, or a 'swipe' hint to communicate that the rows are horizontally scrollable carousels.

issues.description: The top navigation category label 'Hot Ga...' is truncated and unreadable. The full label (likely 'Hot Games') is cut off without an ellipsis or tooltip, making it unclear to users.
issues.suggestion: Either reduce font size, abbreviate the label intentionally (e.g., 'Hot'), or ensure the horizontal nav scrolls so all labels are fully visible.

issues.description: The 'Casino' bottom navigation tab appears visually misaligned — it sits at a lower vertical position and outside the standard tab bar boundary compared to the other bottom nav items (Live Casino, Sports, Poker, Promos, Support).
issues.suggestion: Align the Casino tab to the same vertical baseline and container as the other navigation items to maintain a consistent bottom nav bar height.

issues.description: Game title text on the partially visible third exclusive game card is unreadable ('MAGNI PHO...'), providing no usable information to users browsing the section.
issues.suggestion: Ensure at minimum a consistent partial peek of ~20–30% of the next card so users understand scrollability, and consider showing tooltips or full titles on hover/tap.
